rows.label: tlk47300162_03_msg0001
rows.name:
Luxuria and Superbia are headed
towards the World Tree, right?

rows.label: tlk47300162_03_msg0002
rows.name:
At least Liberalitas's
staying where it is.

rows.label: tlk47300162_03_msg0003
rows.name:
I guess that's because no one's in
control of one Divine Beast here.
I hope things settle down soon...
